title: Umeå Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Umeå, with a Z-Score of -3.80. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umeå are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity, with 73% umidita, and moderate winds of 7.6 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) of 14.3 GG, and no cooling degree days (CDD) of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
